# Repository Map

- `AGENTS.md`: canonical operating contract.
- `.github/agents/`: agent hierarchy.
- `.github/instructions/`: scoped rules.
- `.github/prompts/`: reusable entrypoints.
- `.github/skills/`: reusable workflows.
- `.github/memory/`: append-only learning and governance.
- `.github/scripts/`: validation and memory utilities.
- `.github/workflows/`: CI and scheduled maintenance.
- `docs/`: human-facing operating guides.
